heroSubtitle: A place to disconnect, reflect, and gather in nature.
aboutText:
Grannen Lodge is a simple, atmospheric space surrounded by the quiet of the forest. We believe in the power of stepping away from the daily rush to reconnect with what matters. 
Whether you are seeking a place for education, creative focus, or simply to spend meaningful time with friends and family, our doors are open. This isn't just a place to stay; it is an experience to share.

retreats.title: Team Retreats
retreats.desc: Space for organizations to connect, strategize, and bond outside the office.

retreats.title: Creative Retreats
retreats.desc: Quiet, inspiring surroundings for artists, writers, and makers.

retreats.title: Therapy & Reflection
retreats.desc: A peaceful environment tailored for wellness, healing, and deep reflection.

retreats.title: Community Weekends
retreats.desc: Gatherings focused on shared experiences and building meaningful connections.

retreats.title: Digital Detox
retreats.desc: Unplug completely and reset your mind away from screens and schedules.

retreats.title: Friends & Family Time
retreats.desc: Cozy, private stays to celebrate, relax, and create lasting memories together.
